finding: A successful pre-commit run can leave an untracked active Team run under `.atm/runtime/team-runs/**` in the real repository because `validate:cli` executes a Team start smoke against the working tree instead of an isolated temp repo or guaranteed cleanup lane.
expectedBehavior: Validators and pre-commit hooks should leave no untracked `.atm/runtime/**` residue in the operator repository; Team runtime smoke tests should run in temp fixtures or clean up through an official CLI lifecycle/cleanup command.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed by wrapping `scripts/validate-team-agents.ts` with a source-repo team-run snapshot/cleanup guard that removes validator-created `.atm/runtime/team-runs/*.json` files while preserving files present before the validator starts. Verification: `node --strip-types scripts/validate-team-agents.ts --case source-runtime-residue-cleanup` and `node --strip-types scripts/validate-team-agents.ts --case hook-team-gate` both pass.
followUp: Keep Team start/status smoke tests in temp workspaces; the source-repo cleanup guard is a final safety net for validator-created runtime residue.
